steps.name: Sign in by email and password
Add products to cart: [Pure Cotton Neon Green Tshirt, Stylish Dress, Winter Top, Rust Red Linen Saree, Cotton Silk Hand Block Print Saree]
Add product [Pure Cotton Neon Green Tshirt] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Pure Cotton Neon Green Tshirt
Check notification has success added product to cart message
Add product [Stylish Dress] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Stylish Dress
Check notification has success added product to cart message
Add product [Winter Top] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Winter Top
Check notification has success added product to cart message
Add product [Rust Red Linen Saree] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Rust Red Linen Saree
Check notification has success added product to cart message
Add product [Cotton Silk Hand Block Print Saree] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Cotton Silk Hand Block Print Saree

parameters.name: productTitle
parameters.value: Cotton Silk Hand Block Print Saree

steps.name: Check notification has success added product to cart message

parameters.name: productTitle
parameters.value: Cotton Silk Hand Block Print Saree

parameters.name: productsTitles
parameters.value: [Pure Cotton Neon Green Tshirt, Stylish Dress, Winter Top, Rust Red Linen Saree, Cotton Silk Hand Block Print Saree]

parameters.name: comment
parameters.value: Provident minus ea aperiam quisquam fugit repellat maiores. Possimus esse explicabo corporis. Repellat quo laudantium cupiditate iste architecto. Nam veniam quos minima itaque placeat dicta maxime. Animi in iste voluptates ad numquam accusamus laboriosam.

steps.name: Fill [Name on Card] input: Clinton Gleichner
Click on [Pay and Confirm Order] button
Check order placed message is visible
